headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights U.S. Bancorp, The Bank of New York Mellon and Northern Trust
summary: USB, BK and NTRS could benefit as falling interest rates stabilize funding costs, improve margins and support loan demand for major regional banks.

headline: Robinhood, TradePMR Join Growing Referral Space
summary: They’re just the latest firms to join the referral space, an area of wealth management that is ramping up.
